reportMocks.description: Posed as ATO refund page. Asks for TFN, bank details, and Medicare number.
QR code stuck on car windscreen, pretending to be a council parking fine.

reportMocks.content: Hi it's Mum. I lost my phone, this is my new number. Can you transfer $200 urgently? I'll explain later.
reportMocks.description: Classic 'Hi Mum' number swap scam. Came from a random mobile.

reportMocks.content: Australia Post: Your parcel is on hold due to an unpaid $3.50 fee. Pay now: hxxps[://]auspost-fee[.]cc/pay
reportMocks.description: Delivery fee SMS. Link leads to card-skimming page.

reportMocks.content: CONGRATULATIONS! You've been selected for a $1,500 Woolworths gift card. Reply YES to claim.
Robocall claiming to be the Australian Tax Office. Said my TFN had been 'suspended for fraud' and I needed to press 1 to speak to a federal agent.
reportMocks.description: ATO robocall. Very aggressive, said arrest warrant issued.

reportMocks.content: Caller said they were from NBN Co and my connection would be cut. Directed me to hxxps[://]nbn-verify[.]net/id to 'confirm my account'.
reportMocks.description: NBN disconnection scam. Human caller, convincing accent.

reportMocks.description: myGov impersonation via Swedish domain. SPF passes but DMARC none; DKIM signed by unrelated onmicrosoft.com tenant.
reportMocks.emailAuth: SPF pass · DKIM pass (markona[.]onmicrosoft[.]com) · DMARC none

reportMocks.content: Person came to my door claiming to be from Energy Australia doing a 'free energy audit'. Pressure-sold solar panels at inflated prices. Asked for bank account details on the spot.
reportMocks.description: Door-to-door energy audit scam. Very pushy. Couldn't produce a business card.

reportMocks.content: Met on dating app. After weeks of messaging, asked me to invest in crypto through their 'exclusive platform'. Site looked very professional.
reportMocks.description: Pig butchering / romance investment scam. Lost $4k before I realised.

reportMocks.content: Your licence is due for renewal. Visit service nsw to renew online.
